concerns.analysis: The table in Section 44 (Appendix A: Council Members) contains only 10 rows of data. The source document's Appendix A spans pages 31 to 34 and contains a total of 36 data rows (31 members across three pages and 5 advisory members on the fourth). The output has omitted 26 out of 36 rows, which is approximately 72% of the table's data. This exceeds the 20% threshold for a major defect.

As noted in check C4, it only contains data from page 31 of the source, omitting the subsequent pages (32-34) that comprise the remainder of the appendix. The loss of 72% of the content within this section is a major defect.
